programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple looks to bring the shores of Key West to their donkey sanctuary in Missouri; despite having experience with building off-grid properties, they face new challenges as they attempt to construct a double container home deep in the woods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent; far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays renovate Michael's childhood brick bungalow for his supportive mom; they add a new fireplace, handmade window treatments, upgraded kitchen hardware and a surprise.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley save a family's two-story 1800s home from a flip that would have been a flop; they restore the original features while working to preserve the property's historical integrity.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays bring beauty, impeccable design and increased value to this renovation by adding a bedroom, vintage doors to separate the kitchen from the living space and retro tile found under the house for a one-of-a-kind backsplash.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael let the fun and games begin as they tackle his and hers shotgun homes in a friendly competition to bring style and new life back to these two unique houses located just a couple blocks from the beach.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After three women buy a cabin they describe as a diamond in the rough, they are determined to create the cabin of their dreams; with the help of Chase and the team, their diamond in the rough becomes a cherished gem for family gatherings.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: A Cabin Tribute to Mimi Eva
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters help Chase's wife, Sarah, restore her late grandmother's cabin to preserve her memory; with only 12 weeks to build, the team works fast to update the interior with a new kitchen, bigger windows, and Chase's decorating style.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters restore a generational camp as the family honors their 92-year-old matriarch. They update the cabin with fresh spaces and heartfelt touches, racing to ready it for future generations while preserving its family legacy and history.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters head to Snow Pond to renovate a generational camp with a tight budget and deadline. Facing heat, supply issues, and surprises, they work hard -- yet still find time for games, laughs, and helping Ashley reconnect with an old friend.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their boathouse-turned-cabin into a summer retreat; with the camp located directly on the water, the Cabin Masters will have to figure out how to reinforce it, address uneven walls and create more space for this family of four.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters head to Snow Pond to renovate a generational camp with a tight budget and deadline. Facing heat, supply issues, and surprises, they work hard -- yet still find time for games, laughs, and helping Ashley reconnect with an old friend.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their boathouse-turned-cabin into a summer retreat; with the camp located directly on the water, the Cabin Masters will have to figure out how to reinforce it, address uneven walls and create more space for this family of four.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters restore a generational camp as the family honors their 92-year-old matriarch. They update the cabin with fresh spaces and heartfelt touches, racing to ready it for future generations while preserving its family legacy and history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Following a recent flood, Mark and the guys step up to help their neighbor rebuild; they repair a garage by wrapping it in barn wood and use log skins to transform a pre-fabricated shed into a log cabin playroom.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In Leivasy, W. Va., Mark and his crew get a strong dose of family history as they strive to save the O'Dell family's hand-hewn log home; Mark also spends some time with his own father and visits a log cabin built by his great-grandfather.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna shares a rich and delicious Friendsgiving casserole, cranberry sauce, green beans amandine and cherry almond crisp for dessert.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Friend and chef Katie Button teaches Joanna how to make some of her favorite Spanish dishes like flamenquines, grandma's olives, simple sautéed greens and a brandied pumpkin cheesecake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna prepares a Southern-inspired shrimp boil spread.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Celebrating her love of mushrooms, Joanna creates a beautiful meal including Mushroom Bisque, Cherry Burrata, fresh French bread with a Garlic Chive Compound Butter and a Chocolate Molten Cake for dessert.

programme.desc: Joanna whips up one of her favorite meals for busy weekends.

programme.sub-title: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather find a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas, and they plan to open up the kitchen, remodel the bathrooms, build a multi-level deck and fix up the boat dock.

programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, N.C., and Lake Gaston fits the bill.

programme.sub-title: Spruce Up on Alabama's Smith Lake
programme.desc: College sweethearts are ready to find a vacation home for their family on Alabama's Smith Lake; they're shown several properties, but each will require some work.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Family Spot in the Poconos
programme.desc: A New Jersey family of five looks for a lakefront getaway in Pennsylvania's Pocono Mountains - they want a property they can put their personal stamp on, but with a limited budget, they need all hands on deck to keep costs down.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Dr Jeff Sanders, Michelle and their two teenagers are a fun, active family who enjoy entertaining, adventure and travel; they want to downsize to a casual country home with European flair in Waco, Texas.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.sub-title: A Farmhouse for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna travel to Robinson, TX, to find a farmhouse for a physician couple with three kids who are planning to adopt foster children; the project becomes tricky when the client gives unfavorable feedback followed by a dose of buyer's remorse.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: In an effort to spend more time with their kids, a couple sets out to build a treehouse in remote Maryland.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Needing to get out of the city, a Las Vegas couple and their son head to southern Utah to build a modern A-frame; but with strong winds, winter storms and a challenging terrain, they must work together to build their dream getaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A young family embarks on their biggest and most challenging build yet -- an in-earth cavern in the mountains of northern Georgia. But building on a mountain will be anything but easy as they deal with a rocky terrain, extreme heat and heavy rain.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of three in the North Georgia mountains is building a geodesic dome home at the top of their property; after endless rainstorms, their build site becomes inaccessible and they question if their home will ever be completed.

programme.desc: A couple plans to build a unique outdoor living space in Colorado by using donkeys to get materials to the top of their steep build site, but their plans go haywire.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark challenges his crew to build a log fort on the Boneyard; they use spare logs and some serious hillbilly know-how to construct a pioneer cantilevered fort, but when the temperature takes an unexpected plunge, the job becomes more difficult.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The builders transform a nearby office space into a showroom for their business; they use vertical barn wood, horizontal barn wood and a timber-frame facade; then they finish off the room with barn doors, hand-crafted items and reclaimed roofing tin.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes
programme.desc: Zoe wants to give her college son a taste of home by baking chocolate chip cookies that highlight a friend's fun technique.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes
programme.desc: When hosting a dinner party for some chef friends, Zoë prepares a dish to impress: a baked Alaska with a sorbet bullseye.

programme.desc: Zoë is invited to a backyard barbecue and visits a local chef known for his biscuit baking.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes
programme.desc: When Zoë's sons come home for a visit, she heads to a pumpkin patch to get ingredients for their favorite fall desserts; Charlie joins her in the kitchen to make sweet scones with squash they picked, and Henri enjoys pumpkin crème brûlée.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes
programme.desc: Zoë explores a Scandinavian tradition called fika, a coffee break with sweets, when she visits a local bakery and finds inspiration for a new twist on her Cinnamon Braid; she also makes a Cardamom Pear Cake and enjoys both with an old friend.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovating Under a Tight Timeline in Surfside Beach, TX
programme.desc: A couple from Dallas searches for a rentable vacation property in Surfside Beach, Texas; they're working under a tight timeline because they hope to renovate the property before their extended family arrives from India.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Renovates Vacation Home in Morro Bay
programme.desc: A California couple looks to buy and renovate an outdated beachfront vacation home in Morro Bay; using their artistic skills, they modernize the home that will be a gathering spot for them and their five adult children.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: En Suite Bath, Deck and a Gate for a Golf Cart in Galveston
programme.desc: Tired of making weekend trips back and forth from Houston, TX, a married couple is searching for their own beach house on Galveston Island. With the help of a family contractor, they're looking for an affordable home they can give a personal touch.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: An Investor Renovates a Myrtle Beach Vacation Rental
programme.desc: A real estate investor is looking to renovate an outdated property steps from the beach, and pack it with amenities to turn it into a prime Myrtle Beach, S.C., vacation destination that stands out from all the other rentals.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Michigan Family Renovates Panama City Beach, FL Home
programme.desc: A Michigan couple, with the help of their 17 and 20-year-old sons, use their previous experience renovating houses to completely transform a Panama City Beach, Fla., home into the beach retreat of their dreams.
